creator: sbruno@FreeBSD.org
text:
Recieved on freebsd-scsi list from Douglas Gilbert:

This is an old report that I think should be retired.
Below is the output from the same model of drive with
0005 firmware (current, available from Seagate) rather
than 0004 shown in the report. This is with the latest
development version of smartmontools tested on
10.0-RELEASE-p4 and a LSI 9212-4i4e SAS controller.

I'm the smartmontools guy to fix that and I can't
replicate it so I'll treat it as closed.

Doug Gilbert


# smartctl -a /dev/da1
